characters.appearance: 3D animated young female. Fair complexion, large green eyes, and wavy red hair. Features are stylized and smooth.
characters.wardrobe: Plain white short-sleeved t-shirt. Small gold crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult human male. Medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, and a short, neatly trimmed beard.
characters.wardrobe: Dark green short-sleeved t-shirt. White wireless earbud in the right ear. Black smartwatch on the left wrist.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Where do you work? [Where do you work?]

Character B says: I am work in a bank. [I am work in a bank.]

Character A says: Thoda sa galat hai. Aap bol sakte hain, I work at a bank. [That's slightly incorrect. You can say, I work at a bank.]

Character B says: I work at a bank. [I work at a bank.]

Character A says: What is your role there? [What is your role there?]

Character B says: My role is... uh, main manager hoon. [My role is... uh, I am a manager.]

Character A says: You can simply say, I am a manager. [You can simply say, I am a manager.]

Character B says: I am a manager. [I am a manager.]

Character A says: Bahut badhiya! [Very good!]

Character B says: Thank you! Par aap kaun ho? [Thank you! But who are you?]

Character A says: Main Supernova ki AI tutor hoon. Hum roz aise hi English practice kar sakte hain. [I am Supernova's AI tutor. We can practice English like this every day.]

Character B says: Par meri English toh bahut weak hai. Mujhe bolne mein darr lagta hai. [But my English is very weak. I feel scared to speak.]

Character A says: Ghabraiye mat! Main aapko Hindi mein samjhaungi, aur hum real-life situations ki practice karenge. [Don't worry! I will explain things to you in Hindi, and we will practice real-life situations.]

Character B says: Yeh toh bahut sahi hai! Main aaj hi Supernova download karta hoon. [This is really great! I will download Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable learning scenario where the user makes a common English mistake and the AI corrects it gently.
- Introduces the AI tutor and the core value proposition: daily spoken English practice.
- Addresses the user's insecurity (fear of speaking/weak English) and provides a comforting solution (Hindi explanations, real-life situations).
- Ends with a clear intent to download the app.

- Serves as the final call-to-action for the user to download the app.
